Class Chilly

java.lang.Object
Main.Pets.Pet
Main.Pets.Chilly
public class Chilly extends Pet
Represents the Chilly pet. This pet can produce a ChillyBoost item as its skill and uses a cooldown system to control how often the skill can be activated.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    Chilly()
    Creates a Chilly pet with its default configuration, images, movement speed, cooldown, and spawned skill item.

  • Method Summary

    Description
    void
    useSkill()
    Activates the pet's skill if it is available.

  • Constructor Details

    • Chilly

      public Chilly()
      Creates a Chilly pet with its default configuration, images, movement speed, cooldown, and spawned skill item.

  • Method Details

    • useSkill

      public void useSkill()
      Activates the pet's skill if it is available. The skill starts a cooldown thread that temporarily marks the skill as unavailable until the cooldown period ends.
      Specified by:
      useSkill in class Pet
